rdf:Description.dcterms:bibliographicCitation: Glaros, M, 2012., Sometimes a Little Injustice Must Be Suffered for the Public Good: How National Security (Aliens Control) Regulations 1939 (CHT) Affected lives of German, Italian, Japanese, and Australian-born Women Living in Australia during World War II., PhD diss., University of Western Sidney,, pp. 337-342.
rdf:Description.dcterms:title: Sometimes a Little Injustice Must Be Suffered for the Public Good: How National Security (Aliens Control) Regulations 1939 (CHT) Affected lives of German, Italian, Japanese, and Australian-born Women Living in Australia during World War II.
